title: Hatchan Rises Again
description: On pages 9–12, hatchan rises again focuses on Sanji, Nojiko, Genzo, Luffy as the fight centers on freeing Luffy from underwater before Arlong’s crew can finish the Straw Hats.
scene: On pages 9–12, hatchan rises again focuses on Sanji, Nojiko, Genzo, Luffy as the fight centers on freeing Luffy from underwater before Arlong’s crew can finish the Straw Hats.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's with all these bandages anyways? Did you happen to fall down somewhere?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How can he still be living with these injuries...!? How can he even stand!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And that glare... is this how a dying man is supposed to look!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I have to kill him right here and now...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I can't afford to let a man like this live...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Laughing at your sad state now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: didn't we already tell you...? That this game is ours for the taking...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But in any case, it's all your damn fault that this had to be more complicated than it needed to be...!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
